description: Perform a hydraulic consistency audit on the Muncie HEC-RAS model results using the unsteady simulation file Muncie.p04.hdf. Identify the simulation time step where flow is maximized at the most upstream cross-section and calculate the Energy Grade Line (EGL = WSE + Velocity^2 / 64.348) for all cross-sections at that specific time. Export the data to ~/Documents/hec_ras_results/egl_profile_audit.csv with columns 'RiverStation', 'WSE_ft', 'Velocity_fps', 'EGL_ft', and 'Energy_Gain_Flag' (True if EGL is higher than the immediate upstream neighbor). Additionally, create a summary file at ~/Documents/hec_ras_results/audit_summary.txt recording the peak flow time index, the upstream river station ID, and the total count of violations found.
